checks.name: No external fetch is executed when endpoints are missing
Connector diagnostics availability resolves to UNAVAILABLE
Connector diagnostics never default to ACTIVE
checks.detail: Service diagnostics state set excludes ACTIVE by default.

checks.name: WMS missing endpoint error code and message
checks.detail: errorCode=MISSING_WMS_ENDPOINT, message=WMS endpoint is not configured.

checks.name: WMS missing endpoint action guidance exists
checks.detail: Set CONNECTOR_TUCBS_WMS_ENDPOINT to enable WMS capability diagnostics.

checks.name: WMTS missing endpoint error code and message
checks.detail: errorCode=MISSING_WMTS_ENDPOINT, message=WMTS endpoint is not configured.

checks.name: WMTS missing endpoint action guidance exists
checks.detail: Set CONNECTOR_TUCBS_WMTS_ENDPOINT to enable WMTS capability diagnostics.

checks.name: WFS missing endpoint error code and message
checks.detail: errorCode=MISSING_WFS_ENDPOINT, message=WFS endpoint is not configured.

checks.name: WFS missing endpoint action guidance exists
checks.detail: Set CONNECTOR_TUCBS_WFS_ENDPOINT to enable WFS capability diagnostics.

checks.name: No hardcoded OGC endpoint URLs are introduced
checks.detail: No http(s) URL literals found in OGC connector files.

checks.name: No connector is ACTIVE by default
checks.detail: No ACTIVE default state evidence detected in current proof bundle.

checks.name: Frontend does not render legacy error-only text for missing endpoints
checks.detail: Legacy error-only literals are absent from OGC diagnostics card source.

checks.name: Frontend renders state/errorCode/message/action fields
checks.detail: OGC diagnostics card uses state + errorCode + message + action for display.

checks.name: Missing endpoint maps to NOT_CONFIGURED display state
checks.detail: UI treats MISSING_* endpoint diagnostics as NOT_CONFIGURED state.
